remotion.purpose: Video rendering — React-based animated explainers with 14 visual types

claude-api.purpose: LLM for content processing, angle detection, script writing

claude-code.purpose: AI coding assistant, skill/agent orchestration, scheduled triggers

feedparser.purpose: RSS feed parsing for news sources

telegram-bot.purpose: Telegram bot for daily digest + user input

sqlite3.purpose: Local database for pipeline data, topics, preferences

react.purpose: Visual editor dashboard UI with canvas, branding, visuals tabs

phosphor-icons.purpose: Icon library (8000+ icons) for visual editor

claude.purpose: AI coding + API calls for pipeline

project_areas.content_pipeline: Automated topic discovery: 7 sources → LLM clustering → scoring → Telegram digest → approve → angle detection → script writing → plagiarism check
project_areas.video_production: Animated explainer videos: voiceover (ElevenLabs) → Visual Router (13 visual types) → Planner (timing/camera) → Builder (Remotion render)
project_areas.visual_system: 14 visual types (Table, CodeBlock, Terminal, List, BarChart, PieChart, Stats, Timeline, ProcessSteps, LogoGrid, Hierarchy, SplitScreen, Kinetic, ServiceMesh) with shape modes and animations
project_areas.editor: React app (localhost:3002) — Figma-style canvas, icon picker, color picker, live preview, branding, inline editing
project_areas.branding: Per-brand theming (colors, fonts, glass, borders, logo) — brand.json config
project_areas.voice_correction: Regenerate full voiceover, splice segments, TTS preprocessing with 500+ tech terms dictionary
project_areas.self_learning: Adaptive scoring from approve/reject decisions, Telegram bot input learning

gaps_and_wishes: Video transcript overlay / captions (planned, not implemented)
Multi-template support for different brand styles
A/B testing different angles or hooks
Analytics tracking (which videos perform best, why)
